stories.title: Messi breaks tie with Klose for most World Cup goa...
stories.summary: Lionel Messi became the highest goalscorer in men's World Cup history on Monday, moving up to 17 and breaking a tie with Germany legend Miroslav Klose in Argentina's Group J match against Austria.

stories.title: World Cup live updates: Messi makes up for early p...
Sources: U-M's May finalizing deal to coach Mavs
stories.summary: Michigan coach Dusty May is finalizing a deal to take the Dallas Mavericks' head coaching job, sources told ESPN, an axis-shifting move that significantly alters the college and NBA landscapes.

stories.title: Sources: Celtics, Heat finalists for Giannis trade...
stories.summary: Giannis Antetokounmpo is expected to be traded before the start of the NBA draft Tuesday, with the Celtics and Heat emerging as finalists to land the Bucks superstar, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: ND lands 4-star WR legacy pledge Julius Jones Jr.
stories.summary: Notre Dame secured a top-50 recruit and legacy pledge Monday with a commitment from four-star wide receiver Julius Jones Jr., No. 50 in the SC Next 300.
